//: Downstream MCP catalog for the orchestrator. Each capability is one MCP server.
//launch: command/args/workingDirectory say HOW to connect; summary/instructions tell the model WHEN to use it.
//placeholders: ${SOLUTION_DIR} = repo root, ${CONFIG_DIR} = this file's folder; any other ${VAR} resolves from environment.
//override: Point MCP_ORCHESTRATOR_CONFIG at a different file to swap this catalog.

capabilities.name: jira
capabilities.summary: Issue tracking — read and search simulated JIRA tickets.
capabilities.instructions: Use for tickets/issues/bugs/sprint status. To read one ticket call tool 'get_issue' and ALWAYS pass the Jira issue key as {"issueKey":"PROJ-123"} — extract the key from the user's request yourself; never pass a sentence. To search call 'search_issues' with {"query":"<keywords>"}. If you do not have an issue key, use search first to find it.

capabilities.name: codegen
capabilities.summary: Code generation — scaffold a simple C# class from a short spec.
capabilities.instructions: Use to generate boilerplate. Call tool 'generate_class' and pass the BARE class name plus optional fields, e.g. {"className":"Customer","fields":"Id, Name, Email"}. Parse the name and fields out of the user's request yourself — never put a full sentence into 'className'.

capabilities.name: files
capabilities.summary: Filesystem access — list, read and search files under the repository root.
capabilities.instructions: Use to inspect real files on disk. Call 'discover_tools' first — common tools: 'list_directory' {"path":"<dir>"}, 'read_text_file' {"path":"<file>"}, 'search_files' {"path":"<dir>","pattern":"**/*.cs"}. ALWAYS pass an absolute path within the allowed root. Backed by the official @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem reference server.
